title: Explore table data using an LLM (Public Preview)
body: You can now ask natural language questions about sample data using Catalog Explorer. The Assistant uses metadata context and table usage patterns to generate a SQL query. You can then validate the query and run it against the underlying table. See [Explore table data using an LLM](/aws/en/discover/database-objects#natural-language).

ref_links.text: Explore table data using an LLM
